shared_patterns.pattern: use of informal language and phrasing
questions starting with 'why'
short, direct statements about charges or fees
similar sentence structures focusing on the exchange rate or fees
direct statements about card issues
concise and straightforward language
similar sentence structures (e.g., 'i don't think...', 'i tried to...', 'my card is...')
my [issue] [is/was] [description of the issue]
i [action] [related to payment or account]
use of informal language and abbreviations (e.g., 'isnt', 'didnt')
direct requests for clarification or assistance
questions starting with 'what do i do' or 'what's go on'
concise, direct statements about card issues
similar structure in presenting problems related to cards
dear customer support, i am writing to...
i would appreciate your assistance in this matter.
i feel like i'm hitting a wall here!
i tried to...
i would like to inquire about...
my card is missing.
my card has gone missing.
how do i put a freeze on my cards and order a new one?
maximum how many days get the courier?
questions about card functionality
concerns about pending transactions
similar sentence structures starting with 'i' or 'why'
repetitive phrasing regarding card issues
longer, more complex sentences with emotional expressions
requests for clarification or help
use of specific financial terminology
repeated structure of stating a problem followed by a request for assistance
